---
name: Experiment
about: Track a proposed surrogate or professional validation experiment
title: "[experiment] "
labels: experiment
---

## Question

What does this experiment test?

## Setup

Non-radioactive surrogate unless explicitly marked as licensed-facility work.

## Measurement

- [ ] I-V curve
- [ ] leakage
- [ ] contact resistance
- [ ] signal comparison
- [ ] degradation/time stability

## Go/No-Go Criteria

What result kills or supports the hypothesis?

## Safety Notes

Any source-based validation must be licensed-facility only.
